data.title: Why TC Biopharm (TCBP) Stock Is Down Over 60% Today
data.description: TC Biopharm shares are trading lower by 64% during Friday's session. The company announced the transition from Nasdaq to OTC markets.

data.title: Why Dakota Gold Shares Are Trading Lower
data.description: Dakota Gold shares are trading lower by 8.5% during Friday's session. The stock is down following the announcement and pricing of a $35 million common stock offering.

data.title: Academy Sports' Growth Potential Uncertain Amid Macroeconomic Challeneges: Analyst Explains Why
data.description: JPMorgan analyst maintains a Neutral rating on Academy Sports, raising the price target to $54, citing growth uncertainty amid macroeconomic challenges.

data.title: Wall Street And Crypto Firms Revive Lending Market After Industry Shakeout
data.description: After nearly collapsing during the last crypto downturn, digital asset lending is making a comeback, with a new generation of lenders re-entering the market.

data.title: JPMorgan Seeks Clarity On Dyne Therapeutics' DYNE-101 Expansion, Regulatory Path
data.description: JP Morgan analysts question Dyne Therapeutics' strategy for DYNE-101 in DM1, highlighting regulatory uncertainty and investor concerns over data updates.
